## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory interview between Bridget McGillivray (growthx.ai) and Michael Morrow for a Program Management role.](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai is a rapidly growing AI-powered content/SEO agency (50 people, 40 customers, $7M ARR) aiming to transition into a tech company](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [The role involves program management for internal AI workflows and external customer-facing processes](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Michael's background in CS, operations, and entrepreneurship aligns well with the position's needs](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Next steps include additional interviews with leadership team members and a final presentation](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview

  - [growthx.ai: 8-month-old company, 50 employees (up from 20 two months ago)](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Current focus: Content and SEO engagements for big brands](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Using AI workflows to produce content with human quality assurance](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [40 customers, $7M in ARR](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Goal: Create repeatability and eventually transition from agency to tech company](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

### Role Description

  - [Program management with two main focuses:](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
    1.  Internal team using AI workflows
    2.  External customer-facing processes and value demonstration
  - [Strategic understanding required](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Implementing new processes and systems](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Potential for RevOps mindset but with focus on human processes](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

### Michael's Background

  - [Originally a musician, transitioned to entrepreneurship and business](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Master's in Entrepreneurship from University of Washington](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Experience in startup advisory and pitch competitions](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Career progression:](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
    1.  Avanti Markets (40 people): CS and new product launch
    2.  Ignite (800-1000 people): Analyst role, focus on reporting and KPIs
    3.  F5 Networks: Program Manager, customer journey implementation

### Previous Project Example: Customer Journey at F5

  - [6-month program to build out customer journey in Gainsight and Salesforce](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
  - [Defined expectations for different phases (deployment, usage/expansion, renewal)](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Addressed inconsistencies in CSM practices across global teams](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Utilized Gong for call transcription and AI-powered analysis](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Tied journey stages to tasks and CSM bonus structure](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)

### growthx.ai Work Environment

  - [Fast-paced, high-growth environment](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Building foundational systems from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [AI-native approach, constantly looking for automation opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Currently agency-like structure, aiming to build product/tech company](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Additional interviews with leadership team members (potentially including CTO)](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Take-home assignment followed by a live group presentation](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Timeline: Next interview likely within the week](https://fathom.video/share/tXrkQey8t3L8uYwNFEonjhqaMxGTu5yy?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
